Description.Name: Doloire
Description.Details:
Originally designed for the Republic of the Sphere, the Doloire was created as the Republic Armed Forces flagship OmniMech. The Republic utilized scientists from Clan enclaves within The Republic to design the assault OmniMech as a powerful and important symbol of cooperation between all citizens, Inner Sphere and Clan. The Doloire was first produced within The Republic in 3121, being produced by StarCorps on Terra. The design would continue into service and secretly be part of the rebuilding of the RAF behind the walls of Fortress Republic. Elements outside of Fortress, including mercenaries, remaining Republican forces, and invaders of former Republic space claimed some examples of the design. The Doloire was designed using advanced forms of Clan and Inner Sphere technology of the era. Designed as an OmniMech with thirty-two tons of pod space for weapons and equipment, engineers used Endo-Composite for its chassis as well as a durable Clan 320-rated Extra Light Fusion Engine. While not the fastest among its peers on the battlefield, the 'Mech is able to handle a respectable amount of incoming fire with its nearly-fifteen tons of ArcShield VII Mk.7 standard armor. The 'Mech's fixed armaments are a pair of Clan Series 2f Extended Range Medium Lasers mounted in the center torso. The primary configuration of the Doloire mounts a pair of highly-accurate Clan Large Pulse Lasers mounted each of the 'Mech's arms. Their accuracy is increased with the presence of Actuator Enhancement Systems placed in each arm. For long-ranged attacks, the prime configuration includes a Clan-tech Gauss rifle with sixteen rounds of ammunition found in the right torso. To help with the 'Mech's heat, four additional Clan-made Double Heat Sinks are added to the configuration. Rounding off the primary's equipment is an ECM Suite

X-class mechs feature upgrades to their armour, thermal management and defensive systems that improve their survivability on the 31st century battlefield.

YangsThoughts: A nice flexible omnimech with advanced construction, good armor, potent clan-spec weaponry and versatile electronics.
